query:
SELECT 
  c.id, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.email, c.linkedin, 
  c.contactTrustTier, c.verificationStatus, c.enrichmentSource,
  c.emailVerified, c.source,
  p.id AS projectId, p.name AS projectName, p.priority, p.projectState, p.sector
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE (c.name LIKE '%Dheeraj%' OR c.name LIKE '%Kandel%'
   OR p.name LIKE '%North East Link%')
LIMIT 10;
command:

  c.emailVerified, c.source,
  p.id AS projectId, p.name AS projectName, p.priority, p.projectState, p.sector
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE (c.name LIKE '%Dheeraj%' OR c.name LIKE '%Kandel%'
   OR p.name LIKE '%North East Link%')
LIMIT 10;
